title: Parole Board Open Management Committee meeting on 4 December 2025
body: "The agenda for the meeting is as follows:   Welcome and introductions of each MC Member Introduction to the Board Apologies, Declarations & Minutes from last meeting (04.09.2025) Action Log Chair Report Vice-Chair Report CEO Report COO Report Transparency Review Implementation Plan IPP End to End Case Management Pilot Overview To Note - Research Review of the Year Sub Committee Minutes AOB Q&A - Submitted Questions from Observers   If you would like to observe this virtually, and/or submit a question for the Parole Board, please email CEO@paroleboard.gov.uk.  The deadline to express your interest is Friday 28 November 2025. "
